identity.mission: Create a high-impact, futuristic pharma dashboard that breaks conventions. Fusion of biology and cybernetics.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Biology meets Cyberpunk.
Content is King: Data is the hero, surrounded by glass.
Zoom In: Focus on the molecule.
Negative Space: Let the data breathe in the dark void.
Contrast: Glowing neon against deep void black.

theme.why: Scientific data visualization requires high contrast. The 'glowing' DNA effect only works on dark backgrounds.

glassmorphism.cards: bg-slate-950/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl
glassmorphism.input: bg-black/20 border-white/10 focus:border-cyan-500/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-cyan-500/50 transition-all duration-300

layout_strategy.dashboard_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 p-6 md:p-10
layout_strategy.bento_hero: col-span-12 md:col-span-8 lg:col-span-9 row-span-2 relative overflow-hidden
layout_strategy.sidebar_panel: col-span-12 md:col-span-4 lg:col-span-3 h-full flex flex-col gap-4
layout_strategy.metric_card: col-span-6 md:col-span-4 lg:col-span-3 h-48 flex flex-col justify-between p-6

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-cyan-500 to-blue-600 text-white font-semibold py-3 px-8 rounded-full shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,242,255,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(0,242,255,0.5)] hover:scale-105 transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300 py-3 px-8 rounded-full

dna_helix_css.instructions: Create a CSS-only 3D DNA helix. Use 'transform-style: preserve-3d' on a container. Generate 20-30 pairs of dots (divs) using .map(). Apply animation-delay based on index.
dna_helix_css.container_style: relative w-full h-[600px] perspective-[1000px] flex items-center justify-center
dna_helix_css.strand_style: absolute w-4 h-4 rounded-full bg-cyan-400 shadow-[0_0_10px_#00f2ff]

motion.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -20 }} transition={{ duration: 0.5, ease: 'easeOut' }}

instructions_to_main_agent: IMPLEMENT DARK MODE BY DEFAULT. Add 'dark' class to html/body.
Do NOT use Three.js. Use the CSS 3D transform technique for the DNA helix.
Use 'Lucide React' for icons (Flask, Dna, Activity, Brain, Microscope).
Ensure all glassmorphism panels have a subtle border (border-white/10) to define edges against the dark background.
Use the 'Manrope' font for all headings to give a modern, clean look.
For charts, use Recharts with the custom palette (Cyan, Purple, Green) and remove grid lines for a cleaner look.
The 'Drug Input Form' should feel like a high-tech control panel.
PDF Export should generate a clean, white-bg document (contrast to the dark app).
